text:
Created attachment 145633
ezpublish-2014.07.tar.gz

Extensible PHP CMS and web application platform, that scales from small
personal homepages up to multi-tenant, multi-lingual corporate websites by
providing clustering, a role based permission system, version control,
workflow management and much more.

Community edition.

WWW: http://ez.no/
